description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a deer with a slender, athletic build and a reddish-brown coat accented by white and gray markings along the underbelly, legs, and face. The deer features a pair of prominent, slightly curved antlers and large, upright, pointed ears. Its face is elongated with a dark snout, and the eyes are set wide apart, giving it a keen, alert expression. The legs are long and thin, ending in clearly defined hooves, and the tail is short and slightly bushy. The body posture is upright and attentive, as if the animal is pausing to observe its surroundings. The surface texture appears to mimic the softness of fur, with a matte finish and subtle color gradations.
description: A realistic deer with reddish-brown fur, white and gray markings, prominent antlers, and a short bushy tail, standing alert with upright ears.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deer's face, antlers, upright ears, and slender legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body profile, antlers, and short bushy tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail, hindquarters, and the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body profile, antlers, and tail.
